positive: A highly stylized, minimalist geometric depiction of a celestial scene. The central subject is a stylized crescent moon cradling a glowing, cosmic constellation map. Use intricate, interconnected geometric patterns (Art Deco meets sacred geometry) formed by deep indigo, sapphire blue, and accented with vibrant gold foil highlights. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, designed for perfect visibility on a t-shirt print. Include abstract stellar dust trails and stylized celestial bodies like rings and orbiting planetary glyphs. The overall aesthetic should be clean, high-contrast, and luminous, mimicking high-quality screen printing or linocut etching. Style: Graphic, Art Deco, Cosmic Minimalism. Lighting: Flat, intense luminosity focused on the gold elements. Color: Indigo, Sapphire Blue, Gold. Composition: Highly centralized, clean silhouettes.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low-resolution, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, noise, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, logo, trademark, portrait, photo-realistic
